states.name: OffIdle
states.description: Device is off without an active OnWithTimedOff timing sequence. No periodic 100 ms timer is considered active for OnTime/OffWaitTime management.

states.name: OnIdle
states.description: Device is on without an active OnWithTimedOff timing sequence. No periodic 100 ms timer is considered active for OnTime/OffWaitTime management.

states.name: TimedOn
states.description: Device is on with an active OnWithTimedOff timing sequence. OnTime > 0 is being decremented every 100 ms until it reaches 0, at which point the device turns off and OffWaitTime is set to 0 and the timer is stopped.

states.name: DelayedOff
states.description: Device is off with an active OnWithTimedOff timing sequence protecting the Off state. OffWaitTime > 0 is being decremented every 100 ms until it reaches 0, at which point the timer is stopped.

actions: if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) and OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) and OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if supports(OffWaitTime) then OffWaitTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) and OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) and OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) and OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if GlobalSceneControl == TRUE then store_global_scene() end if
if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if GlobalSceneControl == TRUE then store_global_scene() end if
if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if
if GlobalSceneControl == TRUE then store_global_scene() end if

transitions.guard_condition: feature(LT) == TRUE AND ((OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0) OR (OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 1 AND OnOff == TRUE)) AND (OffWaitTime <= 0 OR OffWaitTimeField == 0)
actions: if OnTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF then timing_timer_active := TRUE else timing_timer_active := FALSE end if
transitions.timing_requirements: Timer tick every 100 ms when timing_timer_active == TRUE

transitions.guard_condition: feature(LT) == TRUE AND (OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0 OR (OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 1 AND OnOff == TRUE))
actions: if OnTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF and OnTime > 0 then timing_timer_active := TRUE else timing_timer_active := FALSE end if
transitions.timing_requirements: Timer tick every 100 ms when timing_timer_active == TRUE

transitions.guard_condition: feature(LT) == TRUE AND OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 0 AND OffWaitTime > 0
actions: if OnTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime > 0 then timing_timer_active := TRUE else timing_timer_active := FALSE end if
transitions.timing_requirements: Timer tick every 100 ms when timing_timer_active == TRUE

transitions.guard_condition: feature(LT) == TRUE AND OnOffControl.AcceptOnlyWhenOn == 1 AND OnOff == FALSE

actions: if OnTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF and OnTime > 0 then timing_timer_active := TRUE else timing_timer_active := FALSE end if
transitions.timing_requirements: Timer tick every 100 ms when timing_timer_active == TRUE

actions: if OnTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime > 0 then timing_timer_active := TRUE else timing_timer_active := FALSE end if
transitions.timing_requirements: Timer tick every 100 ms when timing_timer_active == TRUE
Internal periodic check; no effect when timing_timer_active == FALSE
Internal periodic check; no effect when timing_timer_active == FALSE

transitions.guard_condition: timing_timer_active == TRUE AND OnOff == TRUE AND OnTime > 0 AND OnTime != 0xFFFF AND OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF AND (OnTime - 1) == 0
transitions.timing_requirements: When last OnTime tick elapses and reaches 0, device turns off, OffWaitTime is set to 0, timer is stopped and FSM moves to OffIdle in same tick.

transitions.guard_condition: timing_timer_active == TRUE AND OnOff == TRUE AND OnTime > 1 AND OnTime != 0xFFFF AND OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF
transitions.timing_requirements: Intermediate Timed On tick where OnTime remains > 0; stay in TimedOn state.

transitions.guard_condition: timing_timer_active == TRUE AND OnOff == FALSE AND OffWaitTime > 0 AND OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF AND (OffWaitTime - 1) == 0 AND OnTime != 0xFFFF
transitions.timing_requirements: When last OffWaitTime tick elapses and reaches 0, timer stops and FSM returns to OffIdle.

transitions.guard_condition: timing_timer_active == TRUE AND OnOff == FALSE AND OffWaitTime > 1 AND OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF AND OnTime != 0xFFFF
transitions.timing_requirements: Intermediate Delayed Off tick where OffWaitTime remains > 0; stay in DelayedOff state.

actions: if supports(OnTime) and supports(OffWaitTime) and OnTime == 0 then OffWaitTime := 0 end if
if supports(OnTime) then OnTime := 0 end if

scene_behaviors: When OffWithEffect is received and GlobalSceneControl == TRUE, store_global_scene() is invoked and GlobalSceneControl is set to FALSE so that the stored global scene represents the pre-off state and is not overwritten by the all-off state.

When OnWithRecallGlobalScene is received and GlobalSceneControl == FALSE, the Scenes Management cluster recall_global_scene() is invoked, restoring the global scene (which may include OnOff) and then GlobalSceneControl is set to TRUE.

definitions.definition: Operational mode entered when a valid OnWithTimedOff command results in OnOff == TRUE with finite OnTime and OffWaitTime. A 100 ms periodic timer decrements OnTime while OnOff remains TRUE.
Operational mode entered when OnWithTimedOff protects the Off state with a finite OffWaitTime while OnOff == FALSE. A 100 ms periodic timer decrements OffWaitTime.
Internal boolean indicating whether the periodic 100 ms OnWithTimedOff timer is logically running. Not an attribute; used to guard TimerTick_100ms transitions.
Bit 0 of OnOffControlBitmap. When set to 1, OnWithTimedOff shall be processed only if OnOff == TRUE; otherwise the command is discarded.
definitions.usage_context: OnWithTimedOff guard_condition for commands received in OffIdle

definitions.definition: Conceptual function that stores the global scene (group 0, scene 0) via the Scenes Management cluster.
definitions.usage_context: Actions of OffWithEffect when GlobalSceneControl == TRUE

definitions.definition: Conceptual operation on the Scenes Management cluster that recalls the global scene (group 0, scene 0), potentially updating OnOff and other attributes.
definitions.usage_context: Actions of OnWithRecallGlobalScene when GlobalSceneControl == FALSE

definitions.definition: Abstract triggers representing Level Control cluster commands (e.g., MoveToLevel(WithOnOff)) that change OnOff and interact with OnTime/OffWaitTime and GlobalSceneControl under LT feature rules.
definitions.usage_context: Transitions modeling interactions with Level Control cluster

definitions.definition: Boolean predicates over the FeatureMap attribute indicating whether the Lighting, DeadFrontBehavior, or OffOnly features are supported.
definitions.usage_context: Guard conditions restricting behavior and command availability

definitions.definition: Conceptual operation meaning the server SHALL ignore the command and send no effect-specific state changes; normal IM response rules still apply.
definitions.usage_context: OnWithTimedOff commands rejected by AcceptOnlyWhenOn semantics, and OnWithRecallGlobalScene when GlobalSceneControl == TRUE

references.name: On/Off cluster
references.description: Cluster whose server behavior is modeled by this FSM.

references.name: Level Control cluster
references.description: Referenced for interactions that affect OnOff, OnTime, and OffWaitTime under the Lighting feature.

references.name: Scenes Management server cluster
references.description: Provides store_global_scene() and recall_global_scene() used by OffWithEffect and OnWithRecallGlobalScene.

references.name: FeatureMap
references.description: Global attribute indicating support for LT, DF, OFFONLY features, which constrain command handling.

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Global attribute indicating cluster version; behavior modeled is consistent with revision 6.

references.name: INVALID_IN_STATE status
references.description: Status that may be returned by other clusters when DF feature and OnOff == FALSE cause dead-front behavior (not explicitly modeled as events here).
